0.text: Large consolidation area with surrounding ground glass opacities and central air spaces in the lateral segment of the right lung

1.text: Consolidation area with surrounding ground glass opacities and central air spaces in the subpleural area of the posterior segment of the left upper lobe

3.text: Consolidation area with surrounding ground glass opacities and central air spaces in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe
